---
title: "Module 7 — PCA"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
---

<!-- Thin module landing (repo convention: index.qmd is a landing, never a
     lecture deck). Decks live beside it; see CLAUDE.md. -->

The closing module: center → covariance → eigendecomposition. Maximum variance
and minimum reconstruction error turn out to be the same problem; variance
explained ($\lambda_k / \sum_j \lambda_j$) and the scree plot guide how many
components to keep. On NHANES, PC1 emerges as an adiposity/metabolic axis and
the near-zero PC6 exposes the BMI–waist redundancy. Ends with the course-arc
synthesis: loss → likelihood → posterior → approximation → discovery.

| Deck | Link |
|------|------|
| Lecture — PCA & Course Synthesis | [m7a-pca](m7a-pca.html) |

Companion activity: [week06 PCA explorer](https://gchism94.github.io/info521-activities-2026/week06-pca/)
(embedded live in the lecture — the slug is week-named; modules ≠ weeks).

[← All slide decks](../../index.html)
